resources.string: Schedules, grades, notices from the coordination office, and UEFS classes. All connected to your enrollment.
Your UEFS schedule pulled straight from SAGRES. Canceled classes, room changes, and exams in real time.
Partial grades, your score, and transcript. No need to log into SAGRES from a browser every week.
Notices from professors, the coordination office, and DCE. Never miss a deadline or an important meeting.
New grade, a notice from a professor, new material posted, room changed. A tap in your pocket before you even open the app.
We tell you the instant it
P1 answer key posted on the board
The same credentials you use for SAGRES.
Use your username — email usually doesn\'t work here
%1$s appears to be intercepting traffic and blocking the secure connection. Are you on a corporate network or using antivirus software that inspects HTTPS?
Something on your network is intercepting traffic and blocking the secure connection. Check whether you\'re on a corporate network or using antivirus software that inspects HTTPS.
Your device\'s date and time appear to be incorrect. Check them and try again.
Couldn\'t establish a secure connection. Try again on a different network.
Passkeys aren\'t supported on this device.
Invalid challenge received from the server.
UNES doesn\'t manage your password. Recovery happens directly on the UEFS academic portal — after resetting it there, come back and sign in as usual.
Set your new password and come back to UNES
Your session expired. Sign in again.
Enjoy the rest of your day, %1$s.
Enjoy the rest of your evening, %1$s.
Tap to download this semester\'s history.
Fetching this semester\'s grades and absences…
The professor hasn\'t added any evaluations yet.

plurals.name: discipline_detail_freq_ok
plurals.item: Attendance is on track — you still have room for %d absence.
Attendance is on track — you still have room for %d absences.

resources.string: Keep a close eye on your absences.
Warning: you\'re close to the absence limit.
Share an old exam or a solved problem set and help the next class.
The professor hasn\'t logged any classes yet.
Make the most of your free day to review or rest.
tap to jump · swipe down to duck
Exams and summaries for your courses
saved on your device for offline access
generating document on the UEFS portal
updated version · just saved to your device
showing the version saved on your device
showing the copy saved on your device
the portal hasn\'t issued this document for your enrollment
there\'s no copy saved on this device to open offline
made with ♥ in Feira de Santana
UNES %1$s(%2$s) - %3$s %4$s\nid: %5$s\nThe data above helps me find the bug, please don\'t delete it if you can help it :)
You\'ll need to sign in with your SAGRES credentials again to see your enrollment, grades, and messages. Nothing is kept on this device.
Your session has ended and this device\'s data has been cleared. Whenever you\'re ready to come back, your enrollment will be waiting.
nothing stays saved on this device
Your credentials, privacy, and what interrupts your day.
How UNES adapts to the system
New grade posted — you got an 8.5
sync and cadence on the server · the client only listens
Fill in what\'s already happened and see, in cold math, how much you still need to pass.
With an average of %1$s you\'ve already got a direct pass. You can relax.
Just don\'t turn in a zero.
Anything above %1$s on the last evaluation gets you a direct pass.
Your likely average leads to a direct pass. Keep it up.
You need %1$s or higher on the last evaluation to skip the Finals.
Even with a 10 on the last evaluation the average won\'t reach 7.0. Finals will happen.
With an average of %1$s, you need %2$s on Finals. Formula: 0.6·average + 0.4·final ≥ 5.
Not even with a 10 on Finals.
With an average of %1$s, you\'d need %2$s on Finals. The max is 10, so passing through Finals isn\'t possible.
Average below the 3.0 floor, no right to Finals. It\'s not the end of the world. Next time.
Even scoring a 10 on the remaining evaluation, the average lands at %1$s. Finals are still reachable, but it\'ll take effort.
Tap the fields below and fill in the evaluations that already happened. Leave blank the one still coming.
"Unofficial calculation. UEFS approves directly with an average "
. Leave an evaluation blank to see how much you need on it.
do the math before finals do the math on you
Deadlines, exams, and holidays at UEFS
your UEFS semester, in your pocket
UNES is built on the work of people who share their code openly. Here\'s who.
None of this would exist without people who publish their code for free.
© %1$s. Distributed under the %2$s license. Provided \"as is\", without warranty of any kind.
Run the build once to generate artifacts.json in the app\'s assets directory.
Adjust the search or license filter.
In compliance with the terms of each license reproduced above.
The real averages of every course and teacher, semester by semester.
Historical averages for what you\'re taking
You\'re in the top %1$s of the class
Worst semester was %1$s, with an average of %2$s
Gap of %1$s points between the toughest and most forgiving teacher
Each one\'s average in this course
Average across the courses they teach
Tap a day to see the activities
Thanks for building this event with us.
Faculty, alumni, and professionals sharing the event with you.
Hands-on — theory and practice throughout the event.
Where it all happens on campus.
The groups that build campus life — and are waiting for you with open arms.
Today\'s next class, with time, room, and top priorities.
Old exams, solved problem sets, and summaries, shared by your class.
Contribute a file and unlock your classes\' collection.
No materials yet · be the first
Materials are submitted by students and go through moderation before appearing here.
Check your connection and try again.
Adjust the filters or submit that material yourself.
There aren\'t any materials for %1$s yet. Your old exam or solved problem set could save the next class the night before a test.
Respect copyright and any professor restrictions when using this material.
Moderation usually reviews new submissions within 48 hours. You\'ll get a notification as soon as it\'s published.
It didn\'t make it into the public collection. See the reason below and resubmit an adjusted version if that makes sense.
Your report is anonymous and helps moderation keep the collection reliable.
Exam from the current, ongoing semester
Tap Save on a material to keep it here.
Which course is this material for?
Upload a ready-made PDF or scan your pages with the camera.
PDF from your device or the cloud
Photograph the pages — becomes a PDF
Only submit material you have permission to share. No exams from the current, ongoing semester.
Couldn\'t read the file. Try another one.
Before publishing, confirm your submission follows the community guidelines.
Don\'t share exams for assessments that are still ongoing this term.
Some professors restrict the circulation of their own material. When in doubt, don\'t publish.
Prefer legible, complete files. Worked-out solutions are gold the night before a test.
I\'ve read and agree to the guidelines. This material may be shared.
Couldn\'t submit. Check your connection and try again.
Submitted! Now it\'s up to moderation
Your material is under review and will appear in the collection once approved — usually within 48h.
Save and adjust as many times as you want before submitting.
Get your schedule ready — the window hasn\'t opened yet.
Your proposal has been recorded. Check the certificate.
When the university opens the enrollment window, it\'ll show up here.
Clashes with %1$s %2$s on %3$s. Swap one of the classes.
Join the waitlist — %1$d ahead of you.
You can select it, but it\'s subject to committee review.
No seat in %1$s? Enroll me in another class of %2$s with an open seat.
Select classes in the catalog to see them here. Conflicts show up in red.

plurals.name: enrollment_tt_ok_text
plurals.item: Your class fits with no overlap.
Your %1$d classes fit with no overlap.

plurals.name: enrollment_tt_tbd
plurals.item: %1$d class with schedule TBD — not shown in the schedule.
%1$d classes with schedule TBD — not shown in the schedule.

resources.string: No courses in the proposal yet.
No seat in %1$s? Place me in another class of %2$s.
Your enrollment has been recorded. Seat confirmation arrives by message.
Your session expired. Sign in again.
No connection. Check your internet and try again.
Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
" has been recorded. Seat confirmation arrives by message."
